title: Software Update - DFU -  Going to sleep mode during update
scenario: DFU does not resume or complete successfully after phone wakes from sleep mode during firmware update
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile phone.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) on the connected device.
5. While the DFU is in progress, allow the mobile phone to enter sleep mode (e.g., press the Power button or let the screen time out).
6. Wait for a few seconds, then wake the phone (e.g., press the Power button or tap the screen).
7. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and return to the Firmware Update screen.
expected: The DFU should continue running or complete successfully. The app should show the update progress or a completion status after waking the phone and returning to the app.
